notes: Hotfix for the Crimson Desert game v1.0.5 save format. The per-item locator changed from a 2-byte mbc word + 3-byte bitmask to a 1-byte discriminator + 4-byte bitmask, which made every socket on every item appear as locked and unfillable on new saves. The editor now detects and reads both formats (no UI change). Round-trip bit-identical on both old and new saves.
